title: tina mural becomes alive
prompt: Image 1 is the edit target and composition anchor. Image 2 is supporting identity and pink lychee candy reference only. Preserve Tina from Image 1, her bookish eighteen-year-old appearance, face, hair, wardrobe, seated pose, pink Peelerz package, rideshare interior, camera position, and ordinary afternoon light. Change only the world visible outside the passenger window. A faded tropical mural on one Los Angeles stucco wall is quietly becoming real: painted leaves lift into physical jewel-green foliage, mango blossoms unfold into the street, and one painted bird becomes three-dimensional. Tina has not noticed yet. Keep the rest of the street documentary-real and slightly drab. Tactile practical surrealism, subtle first-stage transformation, youthful but not childish. Do not borrow Image 2 camera angle or crop. No added characters inside the car, no fantasy glow, no text.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Generate exploratory cinematic candy-commercial styleframes. Follow the stated role of each reference image. When Image 1 is named as the edit target, preserve its subject, face, wardrobe, car interior, camera position, and photographic realism unless the prompt explicitly changes them. Avoid captions, panel borders, watermarks, generic candyland, and random rainbow effects.
